name: PolygonNode
summary: The PolygonNode class represents flat geometry tree node.

constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PolygonNode class.

methods.summary: Entry method for the visitor pattern

properties.summary: Gets or sets the contour points of flat geometry.

properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this geometry node was automatically generated (returns false if it was originally a user-defined part)
